name: claude-workflow
description: Chinese-first Claude Code workflow skills, routing rules, and SessionStart hook.

scripts.validate: npm run check && claude plugin validate .claude-plugin/plugin.json && claude plugin validate .claude-plugin/marketplace.json && node hooks/session-start.js && node scripts/session-start.js && node .claude/hooks/session-start.js
scripts.install:dev: claude plugin marketplace add ./ --scope user && claude plugin install claude-workflow@yoyosenran-tools --scope user
scripts.install:github: claude plugin marketplace add https://github.com/YoYoSenRan/claude-workflow.git --scope user && claude plugin install claude-workflow@yoyosenran-tools --scope user
scripts.uninstall: claude plugin uninstall claude-workflow --scope user && claude plugin marketplace remove yoyosenran-tools
